args.code: (() => { const findScroller=()=>{ let best=null; document.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(el=>{ const oy=getComputedStyle(el).overflowY; if((oy==='auto'||oy==='scroll') && el.scrollHeight>el.clientHeight+20){ if(!best||el.clientHeight>best.clientHeight) best=el; } }); return best; }; const sc=findScroller(); return JSON.stringify({ scroller: sc?sc.tagName:'none', top: sc?sc.scrollTop:0, sh: sc?sc.scrollHeight:0, ch: sc?sc.clientHeight:0, fie:document.querySelectorAll('.fie-impression-container').length, dvn:document.querySelectorAll('[data-view-name="feed-full-update"]').length, actor:document.querySelectorAll('.update-components-actor').length, followBtns:[...document.querySelectorAll('button')].filter(b=>/^(Follow|Connect)$/.test((b.innerText||'').trim())).length }); })()
